# StarRay Hotel — Detailed site summary

StarRay Hotel Group Indonesia is presented as a hotel branding and operating platform focused on Indonesia. The site is built in English, Simplified Chinese, and Indonesian.

## Brand
Brand line: Certainty in the City.

The brand framework is organized around three guest experience pillars:
1. REST — Certainty in Sleep
2. RELAX — Certainty in Comfort
3. RESET — Certainty in Recovery

## Company platform
The platform combines:
- brand capability
- operating systems
- local execution
- supply-chain integration
- technology-enabled management

## Current foundation
- Established: 2025
- Operating hotels: 2
- Current rooms: 256
- Total projects: 7

## Founder credentials
- Bill Lin
- Co-Investor, Delonix Bravo Investment
- Former President, Delonix Group Indonesia
- Former CEO, Plateno Group International

## Projects currently shown
- StarRay Hotel Mangga Dua
- IKN Mixed-use Project / Delonix Nusantara
- StarRay Hotel Kebayoran

## Partnerships
The website highlights three partnership directions:
- owner partnership
- new hotel development
- strategic capital

## Booking
The website has a booking page in all three languages. Booking is marked as coming soon.

## Contact
Primary contact email: Bill.lin@starrayhotel.com
Site URL: https://www.starrayhotel.com/
